title: Video-to-World Generation
description: User provides a conditioning video and per-view text prompts; the pipeline generates a multiview world video using diffusion.

actors.name: User
actors.description: Provides conditioning video path and per-view text prompt dict (front, left, right, back, back_left, back_right)

actors.name: T5TextEncoder
actors.description: CosmosT5TextEncoder encodes each per-view prompt into embedding tensors

actors.name: Tokenizer (VAE)
actors.description: Encodes conditioning video frames to latent space and decodes generated latents back to video

actors.name: DiffusionDIT (MultiviewVideoExtendGeneralDIT)
actors.description: Transformer neural network predicting noise; concatenates condition_video_input_mask to input channels

actors.name: Guardrail
actors.description: Optional safety checker for text prompts and generated video content

actors.name: PromptUpsampler (VLM)
actors.description: Optional VLM-based upsampler that generates richer prompts from the conditioning video

use_cases.name: Generate Multiview World Video
use_cases.description: End-to-end: submit conditioning video + per-view prompts, receive multiview world video np.ndarray [T,H,W,C]

use_cases.name: Encode Per-View Text Prompts
use_cases.description: Encode 6 per-view prompts (front/left/right/back/back_left/back_right) to T5 embedding tensors

use_cases.name: Encode Conditioning Video to Latent
use_cases.description: Read video frames BCTHW, rearrange for multiview, encode to latent space via tokenizer

use_cases.name: Run Multiview Diffusion Denoising
use_cases.description: Iterative CFG denoising loop (default 35 steps, guidance=7.0); applies condition_video_indicator masking and noise augmentation

use_cases.name: Decode Latent to Video Frames
use_cases.description: Rearrange multiview latent B,C,(V*T),H,W; tokenizer decode; rearrange back; return uint8 np.ndarray

use_cases.name: Safety Check (Guardrail)
use_cases.description: Optional: check input prompts and generated video against safety policy; returns None if unsafe
use_cases.note: V2W multiview pipeline skips guardrail in current generate() implementation

use_cases.name: Upsample Prompt via VLM
use_cases.description: Optional: VLM processes conditioning video to generate enriched text prompts (inherited from V2W single-view parent)

key_relationships: MultiviewVideoExtendGeneralDIT extends MultiviewGeneralDIT (adds +1 input channel for condition mask)
interaction_flow: Pipeline -> T5TextEncoder: _run_text_embedding_on_prompt_with_offload([front, left, right, back, back_left, back_right])
T5TextEncoder -> Pipeline: returns list of 6 embedding tensors
Pipeline -> inference_utils: get_video_batch_for_multiview_model(model, embeddings, H, W, fps, num_frames*n_views)
Pipeline -> inference_utils: get_condition_latent_multiview(model, video_path, num_input_frames, state_shape)
Pipeline -> inference_utils: generate_world_from_video(model, state_shape, data_batch, guidance, steps, seed, condition_latent, num_input_frames)
inference_utils -> DiffusionMultiviewV2WModel: generate_samples_from_batch(data_batch, guidance=7.0, seed, state_shape, num_steps=35, condition_latent, num_condition_t)
DiffusionMultiviewV2WModel [loop]: apply CFG: output = cond + guidance*(cond - uncond)
DiffusionMultiviewV2WModel [loop] -> Scheduler: step(output, t, xt) -> prev_sample
DiffusionMultiviewV2WModel -> Pipeline: returns generated latent samples
Pipeline -> DiffusionMultiviewV2WModel: model.decode(latent) -> rearrange -> uint8 numpy [T,H,W,C]

multiview_specifics.latent_layout: B,C,(V*T),H,W rearranged to (B*V),C,T,H,W for per-view tokenizer ops
multiview_specifics.condition_video_input_mask: binary mask (B,1,T,H,W) indicating condition vs generation region, concatenated as extra input channel to DIT
multiview_specifics.context_parallel: optional split_inputs_cp / cat_outputs_cp along temporal dim for distributed inference
multiview_specifics.condition_augment_sigma: noise added to condition frames during denoising loop

offload_strategy: Individual components (network, tokenizer, text_encoder, guardrail, prompt_upsampler) can be CPU-offloaded independently to manage GPU memory
